title: New Latvian government approved by parliament
summary_full: As expected, a new four-party coalition government was approved by Latvia's parliament, the Saeima, on Thursday, May 28th.
summary_public: As expected, a new four-party coalition government was approved by Latvia's parliament, the Saeima, on Thursday, May 28th.

LV.label: positive
LV.evidence: New Latvian government approved by parliament
